allow: Bash(wsl -e bash -c "source /usr/lib/openfoam/openfoam2412/etc/bashrc 2>/dev/null && foamVersion && echo 'OpenFOAM OK' || echo 'OpenFOAM not found at default path'")

Bash(wsl -e bash -c "find /usr /opt -name 'foamVersion' 2>/dev/null; ls /usr/lib/openfoam/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'No openfoam dir in /usr/lib'; ls /opt/openfoam* 2>/dev/null || echo 'No openfoam dir in /opt'")
